programme.desc: Dev Mehta, a top surgeon who can't remember his own skills & past 8 years of life. now, forced to restart as an intern and have to re-learn medicine and face the family he no longer knows.

programme.title: Ghulam

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: Pushpa Patel, a small entrepreneur and an endearing mother of three faces life's challenges with resilience and courage. Her constant pursuit of living a good life serves as an inspiration to many.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Flash Shelton and his team head to Vancouver, Washington to help a homeowner after a house sitter overstays her welcome and becomes an unwanted squatter; when Flash's team attempts to reclaim the home by using surveillance cameras, megaphones and even snakes, the confrontation turns into a tense standoff.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Cle Elum, Washington, Casey lost her dream home to a stranger who claimed it as her own for over 4 months and even tried to rent rooms out to other people for profit; but when Flash and his team move in, will their tactics be enough for this squatter to finally leave once and for all?

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: The team head to Conroe, Texas, to help a grieving family reclaim their late grandmother's home from a squatter couple who moved in after her passing; tensions run high when the couple resists leaving.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: Two brothers find themselves in a heated showdown with a group of Alabama golfers during an afternoon on the back nine.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Florida, a man's refusal to move his van from the middle of the road quickly lands him in handcuffs; in Pennsylvania, a Halloween party takes a terrifying turn when an angry man crashes through the front door; and in Washington state, a heated confrontation erupts when a vocal protester targets a dog owner.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: Neighbors in Dayton, Ohio quarrel after construction nails apparently litter a yard where children play; in Olympia, Wash., a couple is awoken by the sound of a neighbor playing basketball against their garage door.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Dayton, Ohio, tensions between two families boil over as both sides accuse the other's children of bullying. In Alabama, an off-duty police officer is struck by a neighbor furious over loud music. And in Florida, a woman's frustration over backyard noise turns destructive when she punches a hole straight through her neighbor's fence.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A woman in rural Iowa angrily scolds her neighbor about the smoke from burning yard waste; a man in Buffalo backs into a neighbor's van in the driveway and the commotion causes a stir in the community.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Oregon, a family is stunned to learn they've been living next door to a wanted felon; on a California beach, a man flying a remote-controlled plane clashes with a neighbor; and in North Carolina, a volunteer firefighter races home after his doorbell camera alerts him to a possible intruder.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: After a California woman removes a fence along her property line, her relationship with the neighbors turns sour; a neighbor in Santa Monica woken up by a loud gathering and unleashes her fury on the party throwers.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: Crossed words between neighbors turn serious with an exchange of gunfire; a woman hiking in mountains is harangued by a neighbor who thinks she is trespassing on his property; a party-loving couple clashes with their neighbors over noise.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Sacramento, a neighbor mistakenly believes two women exchanging hair products in the park are actually selling drugs; a belligerent woman smashes her neighbor's window in Virginia; neighbors in Canada clash about a lawn care specialist.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A video gamer is so spooked by would-be burglars that he opens fire through the door of his Dallas apartment building; a neighbor driving a golf cart subdues a stranger smashing up property in Illinois.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A woman and her sisters are moving in when a new neighbor takes issue with their discarded furniture; a package delivery triggers a full-on raid; a peaceful day at the boat dock erupts when an angry man threatens a neighbor with a "toothpick.".

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: An irate homeowner complains that her neighbors are smoking too close to her house; an Atlanta woman is not feeling blessed when her neighbor splashes her door with holy water.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Tennessee, a wrong-way confrontation at an apartment complex erupts into a shouting standoff with a surprising twist; in South Bend, Ind., a long-running feud over dogs, trash and surveillance turns toxic when one neighbor resorts to biological warfare; in Austin, Texas, a hallway dispute spirals from noise complaints into a battle of doorbell camera taunts.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In California, a man threatens a couple with pepper spray over their dog's behavior; in Georgia, a construction crew faces off with a neighbor determined to shut them down; in Kentucky, a woman renting out her home gets a wake-up call from a neighbor about a loud party at the property.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: When a man claims possession of a cherished family lake house in New York, Flash and his team race to reclaim it. Convinced he knows the law, the combative squatter refuses to budge, escalating tensions at every turn. With Flash going undercover next door, can he gather the intel he needs to outsmart the squatter and take back the home?

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: With bold tactics and street smarts, Flash Shelton and his team face tense and sometimes dangerous situations to help families reclaim their property against squatters.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: During renovations, Andrew's Philadelphia home was taken over by squatters who moved in, changed the locks, and installed security cameras; what begins as a straightforward case quickly escalates into a tense standoff with authorities, as Flash and his team attempt to reclaim the property without any help from the neighborhood.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Washington, health issues forced Zachary out of his dream home; he rented it to seemingly trustworthy tenants-only to realize they were alleged serial squatters who stopped paying and refused to leave; in one of his toughest fights yet, can Flash and his team take this home back?

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars

programme.title: General Hospital
